name: Create channel with title, description, and turn on notify users, allow content publish and verify the created channel
fullName: Create, Update, Delete Channel And Add, Delete Topics and Groups from Channel: Create channel with title, description, and turn on notify users, allow content publish and verify the created channel

steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
Given user navigates to "channel" section of create
When user "creates" channel with title "Channel Python FT" and description "Hi! This is an Automated Channel" and visibility "All logged-in users"
Then user verifies channel "created" with title "Channel Python FT" and description "Hi! This is an Automated Channel"
And user logs in as "cucuser1@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Channels" section of Explore
When user "searches" the entity "Channel Python FT" from Explore "Channels" using Filter "All"
When the user selects the "link" to click on the channel "Channel Python FT"
Then user verifies channel "created" with title "Channel Python FT" and description "Hi! This is an Automated Channel"

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Create, Update, Delete Channel And Add, Delete Topics and Groups from Channel
